Uses of Interface
Subject

  • Uses of Subject in <Unnamed>

    Classes in <Unnamed> that implement Subject 
    Modifier and Type Class Description
    class  GeneticAlgorithm
    This class implements Subject interface and it has a template method named run
    class  Version1GA
    Version 1 will use roulette wheel selection and 1 point crossover.
    class  Version2GA
    Version 2 will use rank selection and 2 point crossover.
    class  Version3GA
    Version 3 will use tournament selection and 1 point crossover.
    Methods in <Unnamed> with parameters of type Subject 
    Modifier and Type Method Description
    void DynamicPlot.setGeneticAlgorithm​(Subject geneticAlgorithm)
    sets the GeneticAlgorithm type
